c),c.instance}initializeAgentOrchestra(){t.forEach(e=>{this.agents.set(e.id,e)})}buildCollaborationGraph(){this.agents.forEach((e,t)=>{const s=new Set;e.collaboratesWith.forEach(e=>{s.add(e)}),e.dependsOn.forEach(e=>{s.add(e)}),e.enhances.forEach(e=>{s.add(e)}),this.collaborationGraph.set(t,s)})}initializeMetaLearning(){this.agents.forEach((e,t)=>{this.performanceMetrics.set(t,{successRate:e.capabilities.accuracyLevel,averageExecutionTime:0,resourceUsage:e.capabilities.resourceIntensity,userSatisfactionScore:.85,adaptationRate:e.capabilities.adaptiveLearning?.1:0})})}getEnhancedDescription(e){const t=this.agents.get(e);return t?t.description:`وصف غير متوفر للمهمة: ${e}`}getAgentCapabilities(e){const t=this.agents.get(e);return t?t.capabilities:null}getCollaborationSuggestions(e){const t=this.collaborationGraph.get(e);return t?Array.from(t):[]}optimizeExecutionOrder(e){const t=new Set,s=[],i=e=>{if(t.has(e))return;t.add(e);const a=this.agents.get(e);a&&(a.dependsOn.forEach(e=>i(e)),s.push(e))};return e.forEach(e=>i(e)),s}getPerformanceMetrics(e){return this.performanceMetrics.get(e)}updatePerformance(e,t,s,i){const a=this.performanceMetrics.get(e);a&&(a.averageExecutionTime=.8*a.averageExecutionTime+.2*t,a.successRate=.9*a.successRate+.1*(s?1:0),void 0!==i&&(a.userSatisfactionScore=.8*a.userSatisfactionScore+.2*i),this.performanceMetrics.set(e,a))}getAllAgents(){return new Map(this.agents)}storeEpisode(e,t){const s=this.episodicMemory.get(e)||[];s.push(t),s.length>100&&s.splice(0,s.length-100),this.episodicMemory.set(e,s)}getRelevantEpisodes(e,t=10){return(this.episodicMemory.get(e)||[]).slice(-t)}}const l=c.getInstance(),g=Object.freeze(Object.fromEntries(Array.from(l.getAllAgents().entries()).map(([e,t])=>[e,t.description])));export{g as E,n as b,r as p,o as s};
